name: aws-greengrass-lite
description: The Greengrass nucleus lite provides a lightweight alternative to the Greengrass nucleus runtime. The nucleus lite aims to be compatible with the Greengrass nucleus, but implements a subset of its functionality. Expect future releases to reduce the feature gap.
description_ja: Greengrass nucleus lite — Greengrass nucleus ランタイムの軽量代替実装。nucleus との互換性を目指しつつ、機能のサブセットを実装。今後のリリースで機能差を縮小予定
